hook: An appliance concierge that books your dishwasher's repair before it floods your kitchen.
core_problem: 120M US households own 6+ major appliances with avg 8-12 yr life; no one tracks failure signals; repair scheduling is reactive and expensive.
ai_leverage: Audio-vibration agent on phone classifies pump/motor wear; concierge agent books repair via local-tech network.
monetization_logic: $9-19/mo per household + $25-50 per repair referral fee.
distribution_strategy: Insurance carrier partnerships (renters/homeowners) + retail (Best Buy Geek Squad).

moat_potential.rationale: Per-model wear corpus across millions improves prediction.

scalability_rationale: B2B2C through insurance accelerates; local-tech network density gates growth.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: dishwashers + washers + dryers. Stage 2: HVAC + water heater. Stage 3: full home health OS bundled with insurance.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the per-model wear corpus, not a UI on Yelp
unsustainable_unit_economics: subscription + repair referrals keep ARPU healthy
validation_invocation: Per-model wear corpus is asymmetric data; competitors triage from generic forums.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + edge audio ML
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-model audio signatures, service history, parts availability.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Tech reviews any 'do not use' alert before notification; insurance partner approves claim escalations.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner gets an SMS 'Dishwasher pump degrading; tech booked Wed 10am'.

hook: A home energy brain that runs your appliances when electricity is cheap and pays you when the grid needs power.
core_problem: 85M US homes pay variable utility rates without optimization; smart-thermostat ecosystem (Nest) optimizes one device.
ai_leverage: Forecasting agent ingests utility tariff + solar production; scheduling agent shifts dishwasher/dryer/EV charge to off-peak; DR-arbitrage agent earns from utility programs.
monetization_logic: $9/mo + 20% of measured savings + DR earnings split.
distribution_strategy: Smart-meter utility partnerships + retail (Home Depot, Costco).

moat_potential.rationale: Per-utility tariff + per-home appliance corpus improves recommendations.

scalability_rationale: Software-only over WiFi-connected appliances; utility partnerships accelerate.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: high-tariff metros. Stage 2: nationwide. Stage 3: V2G + battery-arbitrage bundle.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own per-utility + per-home model
regulatory_blind_spot: state PUC + utility data sharing rules
validation_invocation: Per-home + per-tariff data is asymmetric; competitors optimize one device.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Matter + OpenADR
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-home appliance schedules, utility tariffs, weather forecasts.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: User approves any new appliance integration; utility partner approves DR participation.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner sees a monthly savings + DR-earnings statement; appliances run silently optimized.

hook: Water leak protection that shuts off the main valve before $10k of damage.
core_problem: $13B/yr in US insurance claims from water damage; existing solutions (Flo, Moen) detect but lack ML-based intervention timing.
ai_leverage: Flow-pattern agent classifies normal vs leak; control agent shuts valve + notifies owner with damage estimate.
monetization_logic: $199 device + $9/mo monitoring + insurance premium discount kickback.
distribution_strategy: Insurance carrier bundles (State Farm, Allstate) + plumber installer channel.
retention_loop: Per-home flow signature lock + insurance discount.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-home flow corpus + insurance partnership improves trigger calibration.

scalability_rationale: Hardware install gates pace; software margins after.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: residential. Stage 2: SMB + multi-family. Stage 3: full home risk-monitoring platform.
failure_avoidance: hardware_scaling_chasm: partner with existing plumbing OEMs for hardware
regulatory_blind_spot: NSF + UPC plumbing code compliance
validation_invocation: Insurance partnership + intervention moat compounds; reject vanity device sales.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Embedded firmware + Python + Postgres + AWS IoT
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-home flow patterns, leak corpus, insurance claim history.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Owner can override shutoff; insurance partner approves any claim flag.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner gets an SMS 'Leak detected, valve closed, plumber Sue arriving 4pm'.

hook: A voice-first kitchen inventory that knows when your milk expires and reorders.
core_problem: 70% of US households waste $1,500/yr on spoiled food; existing apps require manual entry; no one keeps it up.
ai_leverage: Vision agent on smart fridge cam + voice agent for verbal logging; expiration agent reorders via Instacart/Amazon.
distribution_strategy: Smart fridge OEM partnerships (Samsung, LG) + voice-first via Echo Show.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-household consumption pattern improves reorder timing.

scalability_rationale: Voice + vision; OEM integration depth gates competitors.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: smart fridge bundle. Stage 2: pantry + freezer expansion. Stage 3: full household-supply autopilot.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the per-household consumption corpus
commoditization_collapse: voice + reorder lock vs manual entry apps
validation_invocation: Per-household consumption data is asymmetric; grocery delivery sees only baskets.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Whisper + custom CV
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-household inventory, consumption velocity, brand preferences.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + S3; per-OEM data sharing agreements.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner says 'finished the last yogurt'; agent reorders + updates list.

hook: Air quality monitoring that triggers your HVAC + purifier before you smell smoke.
core_problem: 85M US households face seasonal AQI hazards; existing monitors (Awair, IQAir) display but don't act.
ai_leverage: Forecasting agent ingests AQI + wildfire feeds; control agent triggers HVAC mode + purifier intensity per zone.
distribution_strategy: Insurance carrier + HVAC partner channel; PLG via wildfire-season SMS opt-in.
retention_loop: Per-home air signature + intervention history lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-home + per-event response corpus improves HVAC orchestration.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: wildfire-prone metros. Stage 2: nationwide. Stage 3: full indoor-environment OS bundled with health insurance.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the AQI + HVAC orchestration model
hardware_scaling_chasm: partner with HVAC OEMs
validation_invocation: Per-home + per-event response data is asymmetric.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Embedded + Python + Postgres + Matter + AirNow API
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-home sensor telemetry, AQI feeds, HVAC schedules.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS IoT + Snowflake; HIPAA-aligned for health partners.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Owner can override; HVAC tech reviews any system-stress alert.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner gets SMS 'AQI rising, HVAC switched to recirculate, purifiers max'.

hook: An AI advocate that fights your warranty claim for you when LG denies it.
core_problem: $8B/yr in US appliance warranty claims are denied or stalled; consumers give up; manufacturers profit from friction.
ai_leverage: Claim-drafting agent generates evidence + manufacturer-specific letters; escalation agent chains to BBB + AG offices.
distribution_strategy: Retail point-of-sale (Best Buy, Costco) + community channels (Reddit r/laundry).

moat_potential.rationale: Per-manufacturer denial-pattern data improves win rates; competitors must rebuild.

scalability_rationale: Mid-tail; community channel; outcome-based ARPU healthy.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: appliances. Stage 2: electronics + auto. Stage 3: full consumer-warranty platform.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state UDAP + Magnuson-Moss Act compliance
unsustainable_unit_economics: outcome-based aligns ARR to wins
validation_invocation: Defensible per-manufacturer corpus; reject vanity claim counts.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-manufacturer denial patterns, warranty terms, dispute outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Bar-licensed paralegal reviews any escalation to AG office.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner submits claim + photos; agent runs the dispute; owner approves any settlement.

hook: An install concierge that turns 'they didn't bring the right vent' into a fixed dishwasher in one trip.
core_problem: 30% of appliance installs require return trips; retailer + installer coordination is broken; consumers absorb the cost.
ai_leverage: Pre-install agent reads installation manual + asks questions of the customer; verification agent validates plumbing/electrical/dimensions.
monetization_logic: $15-30 per install (paid by retailer or installer); upsell to warranty.
distribution_strategy: Direct retailer integration (Best Buy, Lowe's, Home Depot).

moat_potential.rationale: Embedded in retailer checkout + installer app; switching breaks two systems.

scalability_rationale: Retailer sales cycle slow; once integrated, scales with their volume.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: appliances. Stage 2: HVAC + flooring. Stage 3: full home-improvement install platform.
failure_avoidance: commoditization_collapse: retailer + installer integration moat
unsustainable_unit_economics: per-install fee + warranty upsell
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for retailer + installer + customer; everyone wins.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Install manuals, retailer SKU specs, installer profiles, success rates.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Installer approves any spec exception; ops reviews any failed install.

ui_ux_invocation: Customer answers 5 questions at checkout; install team arrives with the right parts.

hook: A solar + battery optimizer that earns you more than your panel installer told you.
core_problem: 5M US solar households leave money on the table; existing inverter apps (Tesla, Enphase) optimize within their own ecosystem only.
ai_leverage: Production-forecasting agent + tariff-arbitrage agent decides charge/discharge/sell per 15-min window.
distribution_strategy: Solar installer partnerships + retail via inverter ecosystems.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-home production + tariff arbitrage corpus improves recommendations.

scalability_rationale: Software over heterogeneous inverter APIs; community channel.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: residential solar+battery. Stage 2: V2G fold-in. Stage 3: full distributed-energy-resource (DER) platform.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own multi-inverter + multi-utility corpus
regulatory_blind_spot: per-utility net-metering rules
validation_invocation: Cross-inverter + cross-utility data is asymmetric; OEM apps see only their box.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-home production, tariff feeds, weather, inverter telemetry.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Owner approves new utility partnership; ops reviews monthly settlement.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner sees a monthly earnings report; system optimizes silently.

hook: Passive aging-in-place monitoring that tells the family when grandma's routine breaks — without a wearable.
core_problem: 55M US adults 65+; 88% want to age in place; pendant alarms are stigmatized; cameras feel invasive.
ai_leverage: Ambient sensor fusion (motion, water, appliance use) classifies normal vs concerning; family agent notifies adult children.
monetization_logic: $199 hardware + $39/mo monitoring; partial Medicare reimbursement TBD.
distribution_strategy: Adult-children D2C + Medicare Advantage health-plan partnerships.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-elder routine corpus improves anomaly detection.

scalability_rationale: Hardware install gates; software margins after.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C + insurance bundle. Stage 2: senior living facilities. Stage 3: full elder-care navigation OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: HIPAA + state telehealth alignment
fake_ai_trap: human reviews any 'concerning' alert before family notification
validation_invocation: Defensible privacy-first elder-care brand; reject vanity sensor counts.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-elder ambient telemetry, routines, family preferences.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Trained ops reviews any 'urgent' alert before family or 911 contact.

ui_ux_invocation: Family gets a weekly digest; urgent SMS only when warranted.

hook: A meta-brain for your robot vacuum + mop that schedules around your day, not its own.
core_problem: 40M US robot vacuums (Roomba, Roborock) run blindly; users disable them after a week; the apps don't talk to each other.
ai_leverage: Calendar + door-sensor fusion agent decides when to clean; multi-OEM agent orchestrates Roomba + Roborock + Eufy via API.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: vacuum orchestration. Stage 2: full multi-device home robot OS. Stage 3: home-cleaning service marketplace.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own cross-OEM orchestration
commoditization_collapse: cross-OEM moat vs single-vendor apps
validation_invocation: Indispensable orchestration for the multi-OEM smart home; every owner benefits.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Matter + iRobot/Roborock API
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-device cleaning history, calendar, door-sensor events.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Owner approves any new OEM integration.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner sets preferences once; vacuums run intelligently around the family's day.
